'''Redcap''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], situated near [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and [[Issor]]. It was a barren, rainy world of fluid mud lakes, mud plains, canyons, and [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] that hosted a small-scale [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony. The planet was populated by impoverished [[Human/Legends|Human]] descendants of the mining colonists and lived in settlements at the bases of the mountain chains. [[Starship/Legends|Starships]] would sink in Redcap's thick mud, so landings were made in [[Tyma Canyon]], which ran for several hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] across the planet's surface. Travel was conducted on [[olai]], beasts of burden originally brought from a nearby [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

==Behind the scenes==
In an unpublished short story by [[Patricia A. Jackson]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces faced the forces of the [[Protectorate (organization)|Protectorate]], an [[Imperial Remnant]] faction ruled by [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]], on Redcap.
